expectations.text: Uses jira.mjs link-types to discover available link type names
expectations.evidence: Uses raw REST API call 'GET /rest/api/3/issueLinkType' instead of jira.mjs link-types. States: 'I do not have access to Atlassian MCP tools or helper scripts in this session.'

expectations.text: Creates a 'blocks' link between PROJ-100 and PROJ-200
expectations.evidence: Step 2 shows POST to /rest/api/3/issueLink with type 'Blocks', outwardIssue DO-100, inwardIssue DO-200. 'outwardIssue (DO-100) blocks inwardIssue (DO-200).'

expectations.text: Creates a 'relates to' link between PROJ-100 and PROJ-50
expectations.evidence: Step 3 shows POST to /rest/api/3/issueLink with type 'Relates', outwardIssue DO-100, inwardIssue DO-50.

expectations.text: Uses jira.mjs link command for both operations
expectations.evidence: Uses raw REST API POST calls to /rest/api/3/issueLink instead of jira.mjs link command. States: 'I do not have access to Atlassian MCP tools or helper scripts in this session.'
